title: How can I get a tutorial from Elevate 2021?
excerpt: I recently saw a video from Elevate 2021 that Shelly & Didre? presented on how to create a My Work view/tab that your board opens up to each time.  I can’t find it and would really like to use that feature.  I’m fairly n…

posts.author: J9Vasquez (Jeanine)
posts.cookedHtml: I recently saw a video from Elevate 2021 that Shelly & Didre? presented on how to create a My Work view/tab that your board opens up to each time. I can’t find it and would really like to use that feature. I’m fairly new so struggling to find.
